description_long: This airplane features a blocky, pixelated design reminiscent of voxel art, with a predominantly pale, icy blue and white color scheme. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection of the fuselage, with a simple, flat profile and no visible winglets. The fuselage is elongated and tapers toward the tail, which is also blocky and features a single vertical stabilizer. The nose is blunt and squared, with a pair of black square markings suggesting cockpit windows. The surface appears matte and hard, with a uniform texture and no visible landing gear or engine details. The overall appearance is stylized and minimalistic, evoking a digital or game-like aesthetic.
description: A blocky, pale blue and white stylized airplane with straight wings, a blunt nose, and a single vertical tail fin. The design is minimalistic and pixelated, resembling voxel art.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, straight wings, and the symmetrical, blocky layout of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, blunt nose, and the single vertical stabilizer at the tail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the squared nose, cockpit window markings, and the flat, wide wings extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blocky head, tail, and the straight wing profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the fuselage or wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted cockpit with a squared, enclosed design and two black window markings.
